tweets.text: The platform is built for the agentic economy, integrating the x402 payment protocol to allow AI agents to independently discover, select, and pay for API requests without human approval loops.

These machine-to-machine microtransactions are settled directly on @solana, where 400-millisecond finality and sub-cent fees support the high-frequency demands of autonomous agents.\n\nWallets holding the platform's native token also receive automatic tiered API discounts, up to 20% off every call.

Managing multiple AI APIs and billing systems creates unnecessary friction for developers. \n\n@AceDataCloud removes this bottleneck by acting as a unified infrastructure platform, replacing fragmented vendor setups with a single API key. https://t.co/xkP8oTfg8N
